prompt: Use the first image of the man in black and the second image of the car to create a poster for an action movie titled 'No Speed Limit: Coming This Fall'.
prompt_refined: Generate an action movie poster featuring the man from image 1 and the car from image 2. The man from image 1 should be prominently displayed in the foreground with an intense expression, wearing his black attire. The white sports car from image 2 should be in the mid-ground, positioned dynamically to suggest high speed or powerful motion, perhaps against a blurred, gritty urban or highway backdrop. The main title 'No Speed Limit' should be large, bold, and impactful, placed in the upper or central portion of the poster. A smaller tagline, 'Coming This Fall', should appear below the main title. The overall aesthetic should be dark, dramatic, and high-octane, typical of an action film.
objects: Man from image 1 (in foreground, with intense expression, wearing black attire)
White sports car from image 2 (in mid-ground, positioned dynamically)
Blurred, gritty urban or highway backdrop
Main title: 'No Speed Limit' (large, bold, impactful, in upper or central portion)
Tagline: 'Coming This Fall' (smaller, below main title)
Visual elements suggesting high speed or powerful motion
